prompt: A cinematic single-panel anime illustration of a ruined mountain lodge interior at night, in a hand-painted concept-art style with dense ink linework, muted teal shadows and warm amber lamp light. Show four young travelers inside a weathered wooden cabin: one figure standing in the left foreground with their back turned, wearing an oversized winter parka with a fur-trimmed hood; one exhausted person slumped in a red armchair near the left-center; one seated person in an orange sweatshirt on the center sofa holding a mug, face partly obscured by shadow; and one quiet bob-haired girl standing on the right in a loose blue belted shirt-dress, socks, and shoes. The room is cluttered with old furniture, stacked crates, potted plants, blankets, cups, a low wooden coffee table, worn rugs, exposed beams, dangling wires, peeling walls, broken boards, and overgrown vines creeping through the structure. Place a large open wall or window at the back framing a cold blue view of snow-covered mountains under a starry night sky. Add two glowing paper lanterns on the left wall, casting orange light across the floor and characters while the rest of the cabin remains in cool blue-green darkness. Include a dark red bloodstain or ominous spill on the wooden floor in the foreground, creating a quiet mystery-thriller mood. Wide 16:9 composition, moody atmospheric perspective, intricate background details, painterly texture, dramatic contrast between warm interior light and icy mountain night, no text, no UI, no photorealism.
